title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 388-3448 Main phone Main phone (541) 388-3448 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Thrift Store: Walk in Donations: Drive-thru on small items. Furniture donations can be scheduled for pickup through website, or call for more information. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 10am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Across the street from Walmart and Dutch Bros Services: Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Sports Equipment Donation Programs Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
